description: Captures the daily attendance of teachers within the institute. This entity serves as the foundational layer for payroll calculation, performance tracking, and operational monitoring. Each record represents a single teacher's attendance for a specific date and includes status, working hours, source of marking, and audit information. It supports both manual and automated attendance systems and is designed to scale toward class-level attendance and biometric integrations in the future.

fields.name: attendance_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for each attendance record. Typically a UUID or structured ID used to uniquely track each attendance entry.

fields.name: teacher_id
fields.description: Reference to the teacher whose attendance is being recorded. Links this record to the Teacher entity.

fields.name: attendance_date
fields.description: The specific calendar date for which attendance is recorded. Only one record per teacher per date should exist.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Indicates the attendance status of the teacher for the given date. Used directly in salary calculations and attendance reporting.

fields.name: check_in_time
fields.description: Timestamp when the teacher checked in for the day. Useful for tracking punctuality and working duration.

fields.name: check_out_time
fields.description: Timestamp when the teacher checked out. Helps determine total working hours and verify attendance accuracy.

fields.name: working_hours
fields.description: Total number of hours worked by the teacher on the given day. Can be calculated from check-in and check-out or manually entered for flexibility.

fields.name: is_paid_leave
fields.description: Indicates whether a leave day is considered paid or unpaid. Critical for accurate payroll calculations and leave policy enforcement.

fields.name: attendance_source
fields.description: Specifies how the attendance was recorded. Enables tracking of manual entries versus automated systems like biometric devices.

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Optional remarks or comments related to the attendance entry, such as reasons for leave, late arrival, or special conditions.

fields.name: marked_by
fields.description: Identifier of the admin or system user who recorded or updated the attendance. Useful for accountability and audit tracking.

fields.name: created_at
fields.description: Timestamp when the attendance record was initially created in the system.

fields.name: updated_at
fields.description: Timestamp of the most recent update to the attendance record. Ensures traceability of modifications.
